message.content: Investigate performance of the task lookup and filtering logic in /projects/taskmanager/src. Profile the hot paths in routes/tasks.ts and models/task.ts. Look for N+1 patterns, inefficient filtering, and recommend indexing strategies. Focus on the GET / list endpoint that filters by userId.

content.text: Let me read the task model and routes to understand the current data access patterns.
Now let me read the routes file to see how data is accessed.
Found the hot path. The GET / endpoint does a full table scan on every request: Array.from(tasks.values()).filter(). Let me grep for any other places that do full task iteration.
Only one occurrence. The problem is isolated to the list endpoint. Analysis complete — the fix is a secondary index Map<userId, Set<taskId>> maintained at write time.
